api_timeout: Took longer than expected. Try again — this happens occasionally.
api_unreachable: Can't reach the AI provider right now. Your message stays in the box.
extraction_failed: Couldn't extract a card from that message. The reply went through; nothing's lost.
extraction_rate_limited: Extraction is rate-limited for the moment. Chat still works; cards resume shortly.
vault_sync_failed: Sync hit a snag. Your changes are on this device — they'll catch up next time.
vault_load_failed: Couldn't load the Vault. Refresh, or try again in a minute.
card_save_failed: Edit didn't save. Your text is still in the field — try again.
card_delete_failed: Delete didn't go through. The card is still here. Try again.
login_failed: That didn't work. Check the email or try the magic link again.
magic_link_expired: That link expired. Send a new one — they're good for 15 minutes.
session_expired: Session expired. Sign in again to continue.
network_drop: Lost the connection. Your message stays in the box until you try again.
rate_limit: You're sending messages faster than the model can keep up. Pause briefly, retry.
quota_exceeded: Hit the daily limit. Resets at midnight UTC. Premium tiers come post-launch.
upload_failed: Upload didn't finish. Check the file size or try again.
upload_unsupported_type: That file type isn't supported yet. Plaintext, markdown, and PDFs only for now.
export_failed: Export didn't complete. Try again — the markdown files build server-side, so a retry usually works.
delete_account_failed: Account deletion didn't go through. Email support@rodix.app and we'll handle it manually.
extraction_returned_empty: No card from that one — the message didn't name a clear topic. The conversation is saved.
model_unavailable: The configured model is unavailable right now. Falling back to the default; chat continues.
